prompt: A cute child-friendly cartoon vector illustration of an Iguanodon dinosaur with exactly four legs: two front legs and two back legs only. Warm clean background, no text, no labels, no watermark, suitable for a children's mobile party game dinosaur image card. Style: child-friendly cartoon vector illustration, rounded shapes, clear silhouette, warm clean background, no text in image. Negative requirements: no text, no watermark, no scary gore, no realistic violence, no blood, no cluttered background. Strict anatomy: exactly 4 legs total, no fifth leg, no extra limbs, no duplicate tail, no text, no letters, no labels. Composition: centered full-body side view, all four legs visible, enough empty space for card layout.
note: Regenerated because previous review image had five legs.
